record.field: {{ (object.partner_id.company_id.email_formatted if object.partner_id.company_id and object.partner_id.company_id.email else user.email_formatted) }}

div.p: Your booking has been confirmed. Here are the details:

td.style: padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; width: 140px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;

t.p: A discussion channel has been created for this booking. You can collaborate with other attendees:

a.style: display: inline-block; padding: 8px 16px; background-color: #714B67; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px;
display: inline-block; padding: 8px 16px; background-color: #00A09D; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px;

div.p: This is an automated notification from the booking system.

record.field: {{ (object.partner_id.company_id.email_formatted if object.partner_id.company_id and object.partner_id.company_id.email else user.email_formatted) }}

div.p: Your booking has been cancelled. Here are the details:

td.style: padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; width: 140px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; background-color: #f8f9fa; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; color: #dc3545; font-weight: bold;

a.style: display: inline-block; padding: 8px 16px; background-color: #00A09D; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px;

div.p: This is an automated notification from the booking system.
